note: normalize_source vectors: newlines unified (CRLF and lone CR -> LF) then trailing whitespace stripped per line (str.rstrip, which covers \t \v \f, not only space); nothing else. Reference: state/audit_source.py::normalize_source / ::sha256_normalized. `input_b64` / `expected_normalized_b64` are base64 of the exact UTF-8 bytes so CRLF/CR survive git EOL normalization. `expected_sha256` is sha256 of the normalized UTF-8 bytes (== sha256_normalized(input)).

cases.name: mixed_eol
cases.note: CRLF + lone CR + LF all unify to LF

cases.name: trailing_spaces_tabs
cases.note: per-line rstrip: trailing spaces/tabs stripped, LEADING kept, last line rstripped too

cases.name: trailing_ws_crlf_combo
cases.note: CRLF unify + trailing-ws strip; interior indentation preserved

cases.name: only_newlines
cases.note: blank lines survive; only EOLs unify

cases.name: unicode_line_trailing_space
cases.note: trailing space stripped, multibyte char preserved, CRLF->LF

cases.name: vtab_formfeed_trailing
cases.note: str.rstrip() strips \t \v \f (more than ASCII space) when TRAILING -> this line collapses to 'a'

cases.name: formfeed_interior_kept
cases.note: an interior form-feed is NOT touched (only trailing whitespace)
